member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Clients.GoogleOAuth.GoogleCredentialFactory
member.summary:
Shared factory for building a from an . Used by all Google API clients (Gmail, GDrive, GDocs, GSheets).
GoogleOAuth is the shared Google-credential infrastructure layer — the same relationship that Workers.Shared has to Workers.*. Each Google client depends on GoogleOAuth; no other cross-client dependency is permitted.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Clients.GoogleOAuth.GoogleCredentialFactory.BuildInitializer(RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Models.OAuthCredential,System.String,System.String)
member.summary:
Converts an into a that can be passed to any Google API service constructor.
Builds a manually (skipping the interactive browser flow that GoogleWebAuthorizationBroker requires). Token lifecycle is owned by , so a no-op is used.
member.param: The OAuth credential containing access/refresh tokens.
The Google OAuth client ID. Required for token refresh by the Google SDK.
The Google OAuth client secret. Required for token refresh by the Google SDK.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Clients.GoogleOAuth.NullDataStore
member.summary: No-op — token lifecycle is managed by , not Google's built-in data store.
